name: Asus XG27AQMR (IPS Panel, Res: 2560X1440, 300Hz, 1ms GTG, G-Sync ) 2K
highlights: ROG Strix XG27AQMR is a 27-inch WQHD (2560×1440) gaming monitor featuring a blazing-fast 300Hz refresh rate, 1ms GTG response time, and Fast IPS technology for ultra-smooth gameplay and vibrant color accuracy

With support for HDR10, DisplayHDR 600, Adaptive-Sync, ELMB Sync, and a wide range of gaming features like Shadow Boost and GamePlus, this monitor is built for competitive gamers who demand performance and immersion
TÜV-certified low blue light and flicker-free tech ensure comfort during extended gaming sessions
